features: NEW & IMPROVED: We've improved our Veet Cream formula for Sensitive and Normal Hair Removal Creams. It now contains 35 Percent less chemical ingredients versus the previous Veet Creams formula and has an improved fresher scent, with no more ammonia smell
UP TO 7 DAYS OF SMOOTHNESS: Veet body and leg creams works close to the root, even on short hair, giving you up to 7 days of smoothness
HYDRATES SKIN FOR UP TO 24H: Veet hydrates sensitive skin for up to 24 hours, leaving a pleasant fragrance
FRESHER SCENT: Enriched with a new and improved fragrance, there is no more ammonia smell
35 Percent LESS CHEMICAL INGREDIENTS: Compared to previous Veet Cream formulas, our Veet Sensitive Creams now contain only 17 ingredients

SUITABLE FOR: legs, bikini line, arms and underarms to quickly and painlessly remove body hair. Before every use, TEST YOUR SKIN REACTION by applying and removing the product to a small part of the area you wish to treat, following the directions for use. If after 24 hours there is no adverse reaction, continue to use
description: Product Description Life's too short to spend it shaving. What about hair removal? Experience silky smooth and delightfully scented skin with Veet Hair Removal Cream for Normal Skin. It works close to the root even on short hair, giving you smoothness for up to a week. Veet's hair removal cream dissolves rather than cuts hair, so unwanted hair takes longer to grow back than with shaving and exfoliates the skin. Veet Hair Removal Cream not only hydrates your skin for up to 24 hours, but its fragrance technology is designed to leave your skin with a pleasant smell. Ingredients Aqua, Cetearyl Alcohol, Potassium Thioglycolate, Paraffinum Liquidum, Calcium Hydroxide, Ceteareth-20, Talc, Glycerin, Parfum, Polyethylene, Sodium Gluconate, Geraniol, Citronellol, Limonene, Vaccinium Macrocarpon Fruit Extract, Punica Granatum Pericarp Extract. Directions 1. Apply the product to the desired place. 2. Do not leave the product to work for more than 6 minutes. 3. Remove the product by following the instructions in the 'safety_warning' attribute. Safety Warning Warning: This product contains chemicals that can cause skin irritation. Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes. Do not smoke during application. Keep away from heat and flames. Rinse immediately in case of contact with eyes or skin. Store in a cool, dry place. Follow the instructions on the packaging for safe and correct use. See more
